aljazeera.title: Crowds hold ‘destroy Israel’ banner at Spain’s Pamplona bull run
Body of Iran’s slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei arrives in Qom

monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 18h ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
UKMTO Reports Attack in Bab el-Mandeb
— S3 · Conflict · Bab el-Mandeb · 38m ago. UKMTO warning 080-26 reports a maritime attack near the Bab el-Mandeb strait. Vessels advised to exercise caution.
Qatari LNG Tanker Sends Mayday After Possible Strike in Strait of Hormuz
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1h ago. Qatari LNG tanker AL REKAYYAT broadcasts mayday after possible projectile strike in the Strait of Hormuz. Vessel had AIS off for 18 days.
